state.next-action:
Phases 35 + 36 planned in parallel (2026-04-12). PLAN.md written for both. Ready for execute-phase.
=== PLANS LANDED === Phase 35: .planning/plans/phase-35/PLAN.md — 6 tasks, 6 milestones Runtime identity detection lib, TRACE scaffold, hook wiring, self-eval aggregation, site badges, smoke test Schema: runtime.primary / runtime.provenance / runtime.self_declared
Phase 36: .planning/plans/phase-36/PLAN.md — 22 tasks, 6 milestones A: gad env (3 tasks) — runtime detection + preflight B: Dead code removal (2 tasks) — trace-active-skill cleanup C: gad eval start (4 tasks) — per-eval repo + scoped clone D: gad eval auto (3 tasks) — runtime shell-out + streaming E: gad eval finish (5 tasks) — preserve + push + Option C cache + aliases F: Site + docs + smoke (5 tasks) — docs, site pipeline, end-to-end test
=== SELF-EVAL (just ran) === 3,450 events | 191 tasks (185 done) | 140 decisions Framework overhead: 23.3% (score 0.7) Loop compliance: 80% High-pressure phases: 10, 12, 13, 14, 14.5, 17, 18, 20, 21, 22, 30, 34
=== NEXT === 1. Execute phase 35 (runtime identity) — unblocks phase 36 runtime.primary field consumption 2. Execute phase 36 (per-eval repos + command split) — uses phase 35 output 3. Phase 35 Milestones A+B can start immediately; Milestone B (dead hook code) is isolated 4. Phase 37 (gad project) still queued, depends on 36
=== GAPS FLAGGED BY PLANNERS === 10 open spec questions for phase 36 (sparse-checkout vs strip, cursor-agent format, TRACE cache shape, flag naming --project vs --projectid, score integration, rollback story) These are tracked in .planning/plans/phase-36/PLAN.md's "Open questions" section.
